title: From DEM to TWI
description: Walk through every step from raw elevation data to a Topographic Wetness Index map — with a clickable 5×5 DEM, live slope calculator, interactive watershed map, and executable Python cells.
author: Mohammad Galib, Purdue University

citation.text: Beven, K.J. & Kirkby, M.J. (1979). A physically based, variable contributing area model of basin hydrology. Hydrological Sciences Bulletin, 24(1), 43–69.
